<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is safe, so moving forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column D is safe, and moving there keeps me progressing toward the goal at row 04 column D without entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right, and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below at row 04 column D, so I need to turn to face down before moving toward it. A clockwise turn will face me down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe, and moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The goal is directly ahead at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe (`O`). I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
